intro:
Solve to swing, score a homerun for math mastery!
Sharpen your arithmetic skills while having a blast!
description:
[Note] Please note that this software is intended for Japanese speakers and features Japanese-language content.

Waochi! Math Homerun is an educational game that combines the excitement of a homerun derby with essential math practice. It’s the perfect way to build math fluency through play!

[Target Age] 4 to 9 years old


● Gameplay Flow
As the pitcher throws, the ball splits into three in mid-air! Look closely at the math equation on the screen and swing at the ball with the correct answer.

The faster you answer, the further the ball flies! Each game consists of 7 pitches. Compete for the highest total distance and aim for a new personal best!


● 6 Types of Math Challenges
Choose from six levels covering everything from basic addition to division:

・Simple addition (up to 20)
・Addition (without regrouping)
・Subtraction (without regrouping)
・Addition & Subtraction (with regrouping)
・Multiplication (Times Tables)
・Division (Up to 2-digit numbers)


● Building Essential Skills through Fun
Speed and accuracy are the foundations of math success, but mastering them requires consistent practice.

This game turns "drills" into a rewarding experience. With engaging animations and a high-score system that tracks growth, children stay motivated to practice repeatedly.

When your child beats their personal best, be sure to celebrate their success! That sense of achievement—the "I did it!" moment—is the ultimate fuel for their desire to learn.


● Developer
Waochi! Math Homerun is part of the popular children's app series Waochi!, which is widely used by people across the country.

The Waochi! series is developed by WAO CORPORATION, a company that operates educational businesses throughout Japan.

With a curriculum based on many years of educational activities, children can acquire the five essentials for early childhood: intellectual ability, sensitivity, expression, autonomy, and pre-school basic academic skills.

This is an app that both parents and children can enjoy together by tilting, touching, and talking. As you do so, you will surely realize that your child is learning various things without even knowing it.

The learning experiences that young children engage in with their families, while enjoying themselves, will greatly expand their intellectual curiosity in the future. Please hold a smartphone or tablet with your child and say, "Is this how it's done?" or "Well done!" By doing so, your child will enjoy playing and learning even more.
